title: Shazu vanilla
description: Shazu Vanilla PvP is a lightweight PvP-focused texture pack that keeps the original vanilla style while improving clarity and performance. Optimized item textures, cleaner visuals, and reduced clutter help players react faster in combat
body:
## Shazu Vanilla 🍁
Shazu Vanilla PvP is a clean, performance-friendly texture pack designed for players who enjoy competitive combat while keeping the authentic vanilla Minecraft look. This pack improves PvP visibility, smoother gameplay, and reduces visual distractions so you can react faster during fights without losing the classic style of the game.
### ✨ Features
⚔️ Vanilla-style textures with PvP-optimized clarity

🗡️ Cleaner swords, tools, and items for better visibility

👀 Reduced visual clutter to improve combat focus

🚀 Lightweight design for higher FPS and smoother performance

🏆 Perfect for SMP servers, duels, and competitive PvP
